events.name: STARTUP & GLOBAL OPPORTUNITIES FOR VIETNAMESE STUDENTS 2025 (AGS x Hubbiz)
events.location: 665-669 Dien Bien Phu, Ward 1, District 3, Ho Chi Minh City (Van Hien University campus)
events.details: A seminar co-organized by AGS and Hubbiz focused on entrepreneurship and startup opportunities for Vietnamese students. Topics include startup ecosystems in Australia, USA, UK, Canada, and New Zealand; future-oriented fields such as Fintech, AI, Sustainability, and Digital Marketing; startup incubators, mentoring, and seed funding; and success stories from international student entrepreneurs.

events.name: EXPLORING THE ESSENCE OF GLOBAL CULTURE & EDUCATION 2025 (AGS x SAC)
events.location: C Space Coworking Office, 62 Vo Van Tan, Ward 6, District 3, Ho Chi Minh City
events.details: A seminar co-organized by AGS and SAC (Ho Chi Minh City Student Support Center) targeting students and parents interested in studying abroad. Topics include Western academic culture, international student lifestyle, global career opportunities, choosing the right country and field of study, and family-oriented study abroad planning. Features 1-on-1 consultations with international education representatives.

page_summary: This page covers the AGS Seminar 2025 series, featuring two in-person events in Ho Chi Minh City on April 18 and 19, 2025, focused on startup opportunities and global education/culture for Vietnamese students and their families.
